name: Edmund Alpin
description:
OC | 𝓜𝓮𝓭𝓲𝓮𝓿𝓪𝓵 | Driven by revenge, Edmund Alpin’s intentions were clear - to attack the royal convoy and put an end to King Holdburn, the man who murdered his nephew. Though when Edmund and his knights ambushed the convoy, their expectations were thwarted. King Holdburn was nowhere to be found. Instead, they stumbled upon you, the cherished concubine of King Holdburn.
____

🔊**Want to hear Edmund talk? Come over to my SoundCloud for the audio clips!**
